title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 3.4 % today, the main contract closed 881.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are wait and see .The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse.PBF at Shandong port deal 860-872 yuan/mt,increase 10-29 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 872-875 yuan/mt,increase 11-14 yuan/mt. As of January 13, the inventory of 35 ports tracked by SMM totaled 130.19 million tons, up from 2320000 tons last week and down from 198.9 million tons last year. The average daily port dredging volume of imported ore in this period increased by 133000 tons to 3.144 million tons on a weekly basis.
